---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

::: {.hero}
::: {.hero-text}
# Heta Shah

## Data Analyst | Business Analyst | Machine Learning & NLP

I’m a Master’s student in Business Analytics at UC Irvine with a background in Computer Science, focused on turning data into actionable insights through analytics, machine learning, experimentation, and visualization.

::: {.hero-buttons}
[Resume](#contact){.btn-primary}
[Projects](#projects){.btn-secondary}
[Contact](#contact){.btn-secondary}
:::
:::

::: {.hero-image}
![Heta Shah headshot](images/profile.jpg){.profile-photo}
:::
:::

## Summary {#summary}

I bring a hybrid background across analytics, machine learning, business problem-solving, and product thinking. My experience spans NLP-based analysis, dashboarding, experimentation, UI/UX collaboration, and stakeholder-facing insights. I’m especially interested in roles where I can connect data, business context, and communication to drive better decisions.

## Education {#education}

### University of California, Irvine
**Master of Science in Business Analytics**  
*July 2025 – June 2026*

Relevant coursework: Machine Learning Analytics, Data & Programming Analytics, Marketing Analytics, Statistics, Predictive Analytics, Business Data Management, Customer & Social Analytics, Management Science & Analytics

### Rutgers University, Honors College
**Bachelor of Science in Computer Science**  
*September 2020 – May 2024*

Relevant coursework: Data Science, Linear Optimization, Information & Data Management, Marketing Fundamentals, Financial Accounting, Business Statistics

## Experience {#experience}

### Student Business Analyst — Cotality
*January 2026 – Present*

- Executing an Intelligent Performance framework for a capstone project analyzing Sales Engineering impact within a 5,000-employee enterprise.
- Integrating Salesforce CRM data with Gong conversational insights to evaluate technical sales performance.
- Developing and validating an NLP-based proof of concept to identify behavioral patterns in technical discovery.
- Translating findings into recommendations for leadership focused on win rates, sales velocity, and technical sales lifecycle improvement.

### Business Analyst Intern — AiVantage.Global
*May 2025 – July 2025*

- Gathered and documented functional, data, and workflow requirements for a client-facing AI marketing platform.
- Supported A/B testing and experimentation across targeting and segmentation variants.
- Built dashboards and executive-ready reports tracking campaign performance, delivery errors, and engagement metrics.
- Identified edge cases that contributed to multiple product and process improvements.

### UI/UX Designer I — AiVantage.Global
*June 2024 – April 2025*

- Designed and iterated an AI marketing platform in Figma through research, wireframing, prototyping, and high-fidelity UI design.
- Improved user engagement, onboarding efficiency, and stakeholder approval speed through iterative design decisions.
- Conducted usability testing and refined workflows to reduce task completion errors.
- Collaborated across Product, Engineering, and Marketing to turn ambiguous requirements into user-centered solutions.

## Projects {#projects}

::: {.project-grid}

::: {.project-card}
### Song Popularity Prediction Model

**Python | NLP | Machine Learning**

Built a machine learning model to predict song popularity using lyrical data and Spotify metadata. Engineered text-based features including sentiment, rhyme density, and song structure, then evaluated multiple models through cross-validation.

**Highlights**
- Combined unstructured text features with contextual metadata
- Compared model performance across multiple approaches
- Found that structural and metadata features outperformed lyrics alone
:::

::: {.project-card}
### Diabetes Risk Prediction Using Ensemble Learning

**Python | Classification | Feature Engineering**

Built and evaluated an ensemble learning pipeline on a 10K-record healthcare dataset to predict diabetes risk. Applied preprocessing, outlier handling, one-hot encoding, and SMOTE to improve predictive performance and class balance.

**Highlights**
- Improved performance over individual models
- Increased recall by prioritizing false-negative reduction
- Designed the workflow for stronger early-risk identification
:::

::: {.project-card}
### Sales Engineering NLP Analysis

**NLP | CRM Analytics | Business Insights**

Developing an NLP-based proof of concept to analyze behavioral patterns in technical discovery conversations by combining CRM and conversation intelligence data.

**Highlights**
- Connects structured and unstructured enterprise data
- Supports executive decision-making
- Focused on win rate and sales velocity insights
:::

:::

## Skills {#skills}

::: {.skills-grid}

::: {.skill-box}
### Programming & Query
Python, R, SQL
:::

::: {.skill-box}
### Analytics & BI
Tableau, Power BI, Excel, SPSS
:::

::: {.skill-box}
### Data Platforms & Tools
Databricks, Snowflake, SAS, Google Analytics, Git
:::

::: {.skill-box}
### Core Strengths
Statistical Analysis, Data Modeling, Dashboarding, KPI Analysis, Data Visualization, Cross-Functional Collaboration
:::

:::

## Contact {#contact}

- **Email:** hetaskz@gmail.com
- **GitHub:** [github.com/hetashah34](https://github.com/hetashah34)
- **LinkedIn:** [linkedin.com/in/hetashah34](https://linkedin.com/in/heta-shah34)
- **Location:** Irvine, CA
